content: The original Self-Refine framework for LLMs can be enhanced by integrating multiple inconsistent self-reflection perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanism research, creating a multi-perspective self-refinement pipeline that retains Self-Refine's core advantage of no additional training or supervised data while improving output quality over single-perspective iteration. This hybrid framework avoids the limitation of single-perspective feedback getting stuck in local suboptimal solutions by leveraging conflicting self-evaluations to surface blind spots the model would miss when only refining from its initial viewpoint.
